title: Alice Game
overview: The story of the Rozen Maidens is retold, leading to a new tale of the eternal power struggle.

title: How To Make a Girl
overview: Jun continues to live a normal life, but things when a package arrives in the mail.

title: Crimson Awakening
overview: Jun continues to get messages from his younger self.

title: Teapot
overview: Jun wakes up and finds a completed Shinku and embroils himself further in the Alice Game.

title: Black Winged Angel
overview: Suigintou's journey to Shinku is revealed.

title: Until the Waning Moon
overview: Shinku and Suigintou call a truce; adult Jun is humiliated.

title: The Present Time
overview: Adult Jun works on a new doll behind Shinku's back; young Jun is at a loss.

title: Antique Doll
overview: Adult Jun's new doll is completed but is missing its head.

title: Phantom White Rose
overview: Adult Jun, Suigintou and Shinku have no choice but to fight after Kirakisho shows her true self.

title: Unseen Choices
overview: A familiar face returns and tries to reclaim what is hers; young Jun and adult Jun meet.

title: Promises and Lies
overview: Souseiseki sets out to restart the big clock and strikes a deal with Suigintou.

title: Rosa Mystica
overview: The Rozen Maidens and Juns part ways; Suigintou looks for Megu.

title: Do Not Forget
overview: Jun thinks he has returned to his normal life; Shinku and the other dolls approach a new challenge.
